title: Senior Teacher - Amity University Advisory Limited - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Amity University Advisory Limited - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Amity University Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Amity University Advisory Limited:
Amity University Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amity University Advisory Limited!
